title: Song from 3010 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack
display_title: Song from 3010 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack
wikitext:
[]: Song from 3.0+1.0 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack?             Quote Post by DondoMondo » Sat Sep 18, 2021 3:14 am This is the song that plays when Unit 13 is hopping around in the anti-universe, and there is mainly a repetitive piano sequence in this song. Based on the order of the soundtrack (which is chronological, iirc), it should go right after 9. I’ll Go On Loving Someone Else =Version Orchestre= but before 10. Pillars Of Faith on Disc 2. I'm not sure why this song was removed, and from the perspective of someone who desires that most, if not all, media were accessible to the public in some fashion, this exclusion has been driving me crazy because I haven't been able to find it online either. I believe that Gap of Dream from EOE was also not included in the soundtrack, but that may be due to it being the same version as EOE (although it would've been nice to include in the soundtrack). There could be more songs that were excluded from the soundtrack, but I don't remember them off the top of my head. Does anyone know anything regarding these exclusions?

[]: Re: Song from 3.0+1.0 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Sep 18, 2021 7:39 am I would also like to complain to the music gods, about the exclusion of this song from the 2.22 soundtrack playlist: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8iPstXGLE_k

[]: Re: Song from 3.0+1.0 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack?             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sat Sep 18, 2021 8:47 am All Rebuild movies have two albums: the "Music from" and the "Original Soundtrack". The music "Gap of Dream" is on the "Original Soundtrack" album that hasn't been released yet*, which is now called "4EM35 A-4 Piano - Omakase Version" (4EM35 A-4 ピアノ・おまかせヴァージョン). * If I'm not mistaken this album is released together with the Blu-ray. You can find a sample of this album in the EVA-EXTRA app. DondoMondo wrote: This is the song that plays when Unit 13 is hopping around in the anti-universe, and there is mainly a repetitive piano sequence in this song.

[]: Re: Song from 3.0+1.0 seems to be missing from the official soundtrack?             Quote Post by nerv bae » Sat Sep 18, 2021 9:02 am JoelcrNeto wrote: All Rebuild movies have two albums: the "Music from" and the "Original Soundtrack". "Yamashita" track is on the "EVANGELION:2.0 Original Soundtrack".

Based on the order of the soundtrack (which is chronological, iirc), it should go right after 9. I’ll Go On Loving Someone Else =Version Orchestre= but before 10. Pi
